plan.pageDescription: This is a demo of the TodoMVC app, which is a collection of Todo list implementations in various frameworks. The page has a text input for adding new todos, and a link to the real TodoMVC app. It also shows the creator of this demo version and a link to the TodoMVC website.
testableActions: Verify the link to the real TodoMVC app works
Verify the link to the creator's GitHub page works
Verify the link to the TodoMVC website works
